summary: T-Mobile subscriber live game in market - Final Game State
description:
GIVEN the user is a T-Mobile subscriber
AND the in-market game has a game state of Final
AND the game has ended less than 90 minutes ago
AND the game does not have a saving pitcher
AND/OR the game level blackedOutVideo equals true in MASTepg
AND the game is not a partner game

**NOTE:** wiremock favorite team 121 Mets, gamePk - 1100002317

steps.action: WHEN the user views the game tile focused or unfocused
steps.result:
THEN a blackout pill does not display
AND a lock icon does not displayed in the upper right corner of the game tile
AND the team colors in the matchup header does not have a dark overlay
